versions.version_description: Simple version, very playable and can be modified to a higher skill level.
I changed the arrangement. So I find it more harmonious - Hope you like it.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Enjoy :)

Capo on 3rd fret


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
You think I'm pretty[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Without any makeup on[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
You think I'm funny[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
When I tell the punchline wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I know you get me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
So I let my walls come down, down[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Before you met me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
I was alright but things[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Were kinda heavy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
You brought me to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Now every February [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
You'll be my Valentine, Valentine[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Let's go all the way tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
No regrets, just love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
We can dance until we die[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You and I will be young forever[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
You make me feel like I'm livin' a[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Teenage dream, the way you turn me on[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I can't sleep, let's run away and[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Don't ever look back, don't ever look back[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
My heart stops when you look at me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Just one touch, now baby I believe[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
This is real, so take a chance and[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Don't ever look back, don't ever look back[/tab]
